---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <h1 class="hero-name">About</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Researcher. Biostatistician. Builder.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Background

I am a nutrition scientist and biostatistician with a PhD and over a decade of experience in clinical and translational research. My work sits at the intersection of women's health, haematology, and applied statistics — with a growing focus on machine learning for health applications.

My research career began with a fundamental observation: iron deficiency in exercising females is chronically underdiagnosed, driven by male-calibrated reference ranges, symptom normalisation, and a near-total absence of large-scale intervention data. That observation shaped my doctoral work and has anchored my research ever since.

---

## Research & Clinical Experience

**IRONWOMAN Randomised Controlled Trial** — Lead researcher on a double-blind, placebo-controlled RCT examining iron supplementation in exercising females. Designed the protocol, managed randomisation, oversaw data collection across multiple timepoints, and led the biostatistical analysis.

**Population Screening** — Screened over **3,000 females** for health indicators and markers of iron deficiency and anaemia across clinical and community settings, generating one of the largest observational datasets in this area.

**ANZ Consensus Statement** — Contributed to the Australian and New Zealand consensus position statement on iron supplementation in pregnancy, bridging the gap between clinical research and evidence-based practice guidelines.

**Publications** — Over **20 peer-reviewed articles** in women's health, nutrition science, clinical trials, and haematology.

---

## Statistical Expertise

My statistical toolkit spans the full range from classical inference to modern machine learning:

```{=html}
<div class="toolkit-row">
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Linear Mixed-Effects Models</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Longitudinal / Time-Series Analysis</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Meta-Analysis & Systematic Review</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Survival Modelling (Cox PH)</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">ROC / Diagnostic Accuracy</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">LASSO / Ridge / Elastic Net</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Bayesian Methods</span>
  <span class="toolkit-chip">Power & Sample Size Calculation</span>
</div>
```

**Primary tools:** R (tidyverse, ggplot2, lme4, survival, meta, pROC), Python (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch), SPSS, Stata.

---

## Current Transition: Research → Applied ML/AI

I am actively building toward applied data science and ML engineering roles in pharma, biotech, and health tech. Current upskilling:

- **Stanford AI in Healthcare Specialisation** — Enrolled (2025–2026)
- **AIM-AHEAD Program** — Python and PyTorch for health AI applications
- **R Formal Training** — High Distinction, University of Western Australia
- **GitHub Portfolio** — This site; showcasing reproducible, documented analyses

My target: roles that combine deep health domain knowledge with computational rigour — clinical data scientist, biostatistician (pharma/CRO), health AI/ML engineer, or research-to-product consulting.

---

## Roles & Affiliations

```{=html}
<div class="role-chips" style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <span class="role-chip">Research Officer · University of Western Australia</span>
  <span class="role-chip">MD Scholarly Activity Supervisor · UWA</span>
  <span class="role-chip">Co-founder · HolisticHer | Perth, WA</span>
  <span class="role-chip">Adjunct Postdoctoral Fellow · Curtin University</span>
  <span class="role-chip">Adjunct Postdoctoral Fellow · Louisiana State University (PBRC)</span>
</div>
```

**HolisticHer** is a women's health initiative I co-founded to translate evidence-based research on iron, nutrition, and exercise physiology into accessible, actionable guidance for women — closing the gap between academic findings and real-world impact.

---

## Education

- **PhD** — Nutrition Science / Women's Health *(Thesis: Iron deficiency in exercising females)*
- **AFHEA** — Associate Fellowship of the Higher Education Academy (UK Professional Standards Framework)
- **Stanford AI in Healthcare** *(in progress)*

---

## Contact

```{=html}
<div class="contact-grid">
  <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:cory.dugan@uwa.edu.au">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> cory.dugan@uwa.edu.au
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:cory.dugan1@gmail.com">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> cory.dugan1@gmail.com
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/cory-dugan-phd/" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="https://calendly.com" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i> Book a 15-min call
  </a>
  <a class="contact-link" href="/cv.html">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i> CV
  </a>
</div>
```
